commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper verdict: pass (sha=3b24634771bb27bc395fa7eafd42cb1203b36a22); current checks are failing: Run agentic native Telegram proof:FAILURE
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a one-time Codex app-server bridge retry with visible-output, message-send, transcript-persistence, and side-effect guards, plus Codex event metadata, focused tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: Source-level yes, live no: current main lacks a bridge-specific retry/surfacing path for the Codex app-server error strings, and the PR adds focused mocked coverage for that boundary. I did not live-induce the bridge drop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No narrow automated code repair is indicated; a maintainer should decide whether the current proof and failed Mantis lane are acceptable for the message/session replay risk.

target.title: Retry app-server bridge drops safely
